# Best Treatments for Hyperpigmentation in Katy, TX

There are several highly effective treatment options for hyperpigmentation available right in the Katy, TX area. Here's a comprehensive overview:

---

## 🔬 Top Treatment Options

### 1. **Chemical Peels (VI Peels)**

content.text: The VI Chemical Peel Precision Plus targets more specific concerns like hyperpigmentation and sun spots, employing a powerful blend of ingredients to lighten dark areas and promote a more uniform complexion.

citations.cited_text: Results can often be seen shortly after the first treatment, with full effects typically emerging within a week. The longevity of results varies, but ...

content.text: Results can often be seen shortly after the first treatment, with full effects typically emerging within a week. The longevity of results varies, but maintaining a regular treatment schedule can lead to sustained improvements.

**Where to go:** H-Town Aesthetics, Luminous MediSpa (serving Katy, Fulshear & Richmond)

---

### 2. **Aerolase Laser Treatment**

citations.cited_text: NeoSkin by Aerolase allows patients of all skin types to comprehensively clear their melasma and hyperpigmentation. As a multi-factorial condition tha...
citations.title: Aerolase Laser in Katy, TX | Hibiscus Aesthetics & Wellness

content.text: NeoSkin by Aerolase allows patients of all skin types to comprehensively clear their melasma and hyperpigmentation. As a multi-factorial condition that can involve epidermal melanin, dermal melanin, and a vascular component, melasma typically requires a complex treatment regimen to achieve clearance and prevent recurrence. The Aerolase Neo helps patients achieve clearance with a safe, effective, and tolerable treatment by addressing each of these factors.

citations.cited_text: The Neo’s 650-microsecond laser energy is delivered into the dermis and epidermis to break up melanin deposits while shutting down vasculature and inf...
citations.title: Aerolase Laser in Katy, TX | Hibiscus Aesthetics & Wellness

content.text: The Neo's 650-microsecond laser energy is delivered into the dermis and epidermis to break up melanin deposits while shutting down vasculature and inflammation.

**Where to go:** Hibiscus Aesthetics & Wellness – 26622 Cook Field Rd, Suite 300, Katy, TX 77494

---

### 3. **Jet Plasma Treatment**

citations.cited_text: ... Jet Plasma suppresses melanin production, helping to reduce hyperpigmentation and dark spots caused by acne, sun damage, and other factors.
citations.title: Best Jet Plasma Skin Treatments in Katy, TX

content.text: Jet Plasma suppresses melanin production, helping to reduce hyperpigmentation and dark spots caused by acne, sun damage, and other factors.

citations.cited_text: Jet Plasma is an advanced technology designed to brighten, tighten, and rejuvenate the skin from within by stimulating collagen production and remodel...
citations.title: Best Jet Plasma Skin Treatments in Katy, TX

content.text: Jet Plasma is an advanced technology designed to brighten, tighten, and rejuvenate the skin from within by stimulating collagen production and remodeling cellular structures. This non-invasive, painless treatment offers long-lasting results without the need for surgery or downtime.

citations.cited_text: Jet Plasma can effectively be used on any skin type and is suitable for all Fitzpatrick levels.
citations.title: Best Jet Plasma Skin Treatments in Katy, TX

content.text: Jet Plasma can effectively be used on any skin type and is suitable for all Fitzpatrick levels.

**Where to go:** Anita's Skin Care Clinic, Katy, TX

### 5. **Dermaplaning**

content.text: By exfoliating the skin, dermaplaning works wonders in enhancing skin tone and texture and addressing hyperpigmentation concerns, all by bidding farewell to those unwanted old skin cells.

citations.cited_text: Moreover, dermaplaning is an excellent preparatory step for more advanced procedures such as laser treatments, chemical peels, and Hydrafacials, benef...

content.text: Dermaplaning is also an excellent preparatory step for more advanced procedures such as laser treatments, chemical peels, and Hydrafacials, benefiting all skin types except those with cystic acne.

**Where to go:** 4Ever Young Anti-Aging Clinic & Medical Spa, Katy, TX

content.text: RF microneedling is also a popular treatment that combines radiofrequency with microneedling to address complex scars and is appropriate for both textured and pigmented scarring.

**Where to go:** Village Dermatology, Advanced Dermatology, or Katy Dermatology (all serve the Katy/Houston area)
